draft.subject: AeroSoft Partnership Offer
draft.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thanks for your interest in partnering with AeroSoft! We're excited to share the details of our collaboration.

- The base fee for this partnership is $375.
- This is a hybrid partnership: a fixed fee for your content, plus a 10% commission on the sales you drive.
- Deliverables include 1 Instagram Reel + 3 Instagram Stories, with 30-day usage rights.

Timeline: Content must go live by October 10, 2026.

As part of this collaboration, you'll receive one pair of AeroSoft Cloudstride running shoes plus a branded sock set.

We'll confirm payment terms and any additional details in the next step. If you have any other questions, feel free to reply.

Best,
AeroSoft

draft.subject: AeroSoft Partnership Offer
draft.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for your message — we’re excited to share the details of our partnership!

- The base fee for this collaboration is $375.
- This is a hybrid partnership: a fixed fee for your content, with a 10% commission on the sales you drive.
- The deliverables include 1 Instagram Reel + 3 Instagram Stories, with 30-day usage rights.

Timeline: Content live by October 10, 2026.

As part of this collaboration, you’ll receive one pair of AeroSoft Cloudstride running shoes plus a branded sock set.

We’re happy to confirm the payment terms: Net-30 after the content goes live. Content usage rights are 30 days, and AeroSoft may reshare the content on its own channels. There is no category exclusivity required. The attribution window is 30 days on the affiliate link.

Let us know if you have any other questions — we’re here to help!

Best,
AeroSoft
